title: Hody’s Grudge Takes Shape
description: On pages 0–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Robin, Narrator, Shirahoshi. The core story beat is hody’s grudge takes shape.
scene: The scene centers on hody’s grudge takes shape, with Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Robin, Narrator, Shirahoshi driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ?-c marine

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Calling the Royal Palace, calling the Royal Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mama, what's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please respond...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Something's flying up there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: can't see what it is, though. It's too far...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Calling the Royal Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the border guard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is strange...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why can't we seem to make contact...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the Den-den mushi ill...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have a report to make...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: A number of dangerous individuals from the fishman district...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ... have just been seen entering fishman Island...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They did not appear to be going on a mere shopping trip.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It could of course be nothing, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now listen up, men.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: This day will go down in history...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...as the day fishman Island was unified under one vision!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This world is not right until all fishmen, Merfolk included, are able to see things eye- to-eye...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: time and again, history has taken the wrong path... but now, we're going to set things straight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: BAROHOHA!! Today will be the anniversary of our engagement, Shirahoshioshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshish!!!!! NO NEED TO RUSH INTO THINGS; the wedding can wait until... tomorrow!!!

summary: Hody’s Grudge Takes Shape. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
